description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, build_rpm, and deploy, and define the DEPLOY_CONFIG_HTTPS, DEPLOY_DOMAIN, DEPLOY_DOMAIN_APP, DEPLOY_RELEASE_PATH, DEPLOY_REPO_PATH, DEPLOY_REPO_URL, and DEPLOY_hrefs variables. In the build stage add a build_base job using the gioxa/base-image-crossimagebuilder image, tagged odagrun, that runs ./autogen.sh, ./configure, make >/dev/null, make check, cat tests/test.sh.log, make distcheck >/dev/null, cp *.tar.gz distro, mkdir lib, cp -L src/.libs/libfakearch.so lib/libfakearch.so, mkdir public, and stores distro/*.tar.gz, distro/*.spec, lib/libfakearch.so, and public as artifacts. In the build_rpm stage add a make_rpm job also using gioxa/base-image-crossimagebuilder, tagged odagrun, with GIT_STRATEGY set to none, that creates the rpmbuild directory tree, copies distro/*.tar.gz to ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES, copies distro/fake_arch.spec to ~/rpmbuild/SPECS, runs rpmbuild -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/fake_arch.spec, makes rpm and srpm directories, copies the built RPMs and SRPMs into them, and publishes the rpm and srpm directories as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only for git tags (excluding branches), uses the deployctl-gioxapp.com tag, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, runs deployctl release and deployctl repo_add, and deploys to the production environment with URL $DEPLOY_DOMAIN.
